title: Reichus Shin Eva AD and CC translations up on Arqa Apocrypha
display_title: Reichus Shin Eva AD and CC translations up on Arqa Apocrypha
wikitext:
[]: Reichu's Shin Eva AD and CC translations up on Arqa Apocrypha             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue May 11, 2021 9:41 am Reichu has been working tirelessly on the Shin Eva AD and CC translations on Arqa, and has put it up in four parts - even though 1, 2, and 4 are currently incomplete. This provides context for Shin Eva and is the closest thing we have to a movie script at present. https://www.arqacrypha.net/post/eva-3-0 ... ation-pt-1 https://www.arqacrypha.net/post/eva-3-0 ... ation-pt-2 https://www.arqacrypha.net/post/eva-3-0 ... ation-pt-3 https://www.arqacrypha.net/post/eva-3-0 ... ation-pt-4 Now, I know that this has been discussed partially in places all over the forum and Discord, but since I haven't seen a consolidated thread for the translations on Arqa I'm starting this one off - in the spoiler subforum, naturally. I'm also keeping this non-stickied for the time being, but I might make this a sticky if it is deemed worth it.

[]: Re: Reichu's Shin Eva AD and CC translations up on Arqa Apocrypha             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed May 12, 2021 7:47 am We must indeed commend her efforts, especially since she adds footnotes explaining stuff!

[]: Re: Reichu's Shin Eva AD and CC translations up on Arqa Apocrypha             Quote Post by Velorex » Wed May 12, 2021 12:52 pm hmm... I wonder how far she is now

[]: Re: Reichu's Shin Eva AD and CC translations up on Arqa Apocrypha             Quote Post by Pluto » Wed May 12, 2021 5:06 pm Thanks for posting this! Extreme special thanks goes to Reichu who I've heavily quoted in some of my previous threads and has helped the community immensely over the years.

[]: Re: Reichu's Shin Eva AD and CC translations up on Arqa Apocrypha             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu May 13, 2021 12:23 am Noteworthy details. 1) Apparently ReiQ's reaction to Hikari explaining the breastfeeding is to try squeezing her own breasts lol. That reminds me of when my little sister was a baby and also didn't understand that not all boobs have milk. I was 14/15 when she was baby and already largely woman-shaped so there was an incident where mom was out for shopping & I was watching her, & she ended up tugging at my shirt/chest all the time, as if to say, "Hey, I'm not dumb, I can see that you got food right there, why won't you give me any?" She even tried her luck with men's nipples on one occasion when my father wasn't wearing a shirt for some reason, her face when there was no milk was priceless. Like you could just see the concept of "context" alighting in her tiny, mildly disturbed consciousness XDD It's also a neat detail that ReiQ goes gaga about all the animals, that's actually realistic - one thing they do with extreme cases of traumatized kids that never had any stable contact person & hence haven't really learned to bond with humans is to use animals in therapy. I recently read that story where one girl that went from completely unmanageable to graduating from highschool and in the end she said it was all thanks to the horse she got to take care of. Though there seems to be, in general, a lot of visual reinforcement of the idea that there is still new life worth protecting in the world after it previously seemed like all is lost/dead - baby cats, baby humans, tadpoles, newly planted crops, random children... Apparently, at one point ReiQ plays with a crowd of toddlers. (I'm reminded of that episode from TNG where data biilds himself an android daughter, and they're not sure what grade to put her in, cause she has intellectual capabilities way beyond a normal human but less social skills than a toddler) 2) apparently the two are passed off so the villagers as "Two kids Kredit entrusted us with" -ie, as far as Touji & Kensuke told people, they're random war orphans. 3) though I've read the whole thing, it sticks a lot better with pics & the description Kensuke is apparently a morning person. (cant relate) It#s like the longest brick joke ever that his survival guerilla training from episode 4 finally paid off 4) where IS she getting the pics? Not all these scenes have been in clips

[]: Re: Reichu's Shin Eva AD and CC translations up on Arqa Apocrypha             Quote Post by Derantor » Thu May 13, 2021 12:46 am Kendrix wrote: 4) where IS she getting the pics? Not all these scenes have been in clips
summary: []: Reichu's Shin Eva AD and CC translations up on Arqa Apocrypha             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue May 11, 2021 9:41 am Reichu has been working tirelessly on the Shin Eva AD and CC translations on Arqa, and has put it up in four parts - even though 1, 2, and 4 are currently incomplete. This provides context for Shin Eva and is the closest thing we have to a movie script at present. https://www.arqacrypha.net/post/eva-3-0 ... atio
